note: Issue #164 211 runtime-only rollout evidence for the 2bc3a35 runtime subject after PR #180. The live API/worker containers use ai-platform:2bc3a35-main-runtime-only-v1 with matching runtime subject, runtime source marker, OCI revision, and hyphen/underscore source-revision labels; the legacy dotted ai-platform.source.revision label still records dab7dbc as a runtime-only rebase caveat. Compose still carries the external env-file label caveat. Later runtime-affecting source changes must trigger a fresh rollout/readiness check before any current-source verification claim.
